chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.S-335 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For hearing of bail application 25-09-2023 Mr. Waqar Ali Phulpoto, Associate of Mr. Muhammad Haneef Maitlo, Advocate for the applicant. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy P.G. ***** Applicant is present on ad-interim pre-arrest bail. Learned counsel for applicant submits that applicant has been acquitted of the charge by the trial Court vide judgment dated 26.08.2023. Therefore, he does not press this bail application and seeks discharge of the surety. Accordingly, this bail application is dismissed as not pressed. The surety is discharged to be returned to applicant/surety after due verification, identification and as per rules. JUDGE Ahmad
